query:
CREATE TABLE `email_captures` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`first_name` varchar(100),
	`last_name` varchar(100),
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`source` enum('web_form','meta_lead_ad','giveaway','clickfunnels','instagram','manual_csv','boomerang','acuity','referral','walk_in','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
	`source_detail` varchar(255),
	`status` enum('new','contacted','qualified','converted','unsubscribed','bounced') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
	`encharge_id` varchar(100),
	`encharge_segments` text,
	`encharge_synced_at` bigint,
	`boomerang_client_id` varchar(100),
	`boomerang_card_serial` varchar(100),
	`boomerang_synced_at` bigint,
	`converted_to_member_id` int,
	`converted_at` bigint,
	`tags` text,
	`notes` text,
	`captured_at` bigint NOT NULL,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `email_captures_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`source_detail` varchar(255),
	`status` enum('new','contacted','qualified','converted','unsubscribed','bounced') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
	`encharge_id` varchar(100),

	`captured_at` bigint NOT NULL,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `email_captures_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
